servers.name: dewy-resort-guest
servers.description: MCP server for hotel guests to manage their stay at Dewy Resort. Provides self-service tools for check-in, checkout, booking management, and service requests. Guests can view their own room and case information but cannot access other guests' data or staff-only operations.

servers.name: dewy-resort-manager
servers.description: MCP server for hotel managers to manage operations at Dewy Resort. Provides tools for guest check-in/checkout, booking management, maintenance requests, case management, and compensation workflows. Managers have elevated access to view all rooms, all cases, and process refunds.
